_comment: Danielian Ideal Customer Profile (spec §4.2, §6). Project-type keywords, unit thresholds, and target geographies. Overrides the in-code defaults in agents/shared/danielian-fit.js — edit here to tune the ICP without touching code (spec §14 'config over code'). To override the project-type vocabularies, add a 'projectTypeKeywords' object mirroring the danielian-fit.js DEFAULTS.
_pilotNote: Pilot is OC-first (spec §1.3 / §16). LA activates in Phase 3, Nashville in Phase 4. Flip 'active' to true (and confirm in docs/phase-0-discovery.md item 1) to bring a metro online.
_minUnitsNote: Floor for CEQA (L3) and HCD (L5) residential filtering — projects below this are dropped at harvest.

permitTypeKeywords._comment: L1 permit filter — Danielian wants NEW multifamily/mixed-use/apartment/condo/townhome/ADU-batch/hotel-residential and large additions, NOT single-family rebuilds (the BBC target). These supplement danielian-fit classification.
